pokemon:manectric.name: Manectric
pokemon:manectric.summary: Manectric discharges strong electricity from its mane. The mane is used for collecting electricity in the atmosphere. This Pokémon creates thunderclouds above its head.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Manectric discharges strong electricity from its mane. The mane is used for collecting electricity in the atmosphere. This Pokémon creates thunderclouds above its head.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
Because lightning falls in their vicinities, MANECTRIC were thought to have been born from lightning. In battle, they create thunderclouds.
It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.
Its nest can be found where a thunderbolt hits. It is discharging electricity from its mane.
It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.
Manectric is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this Pokémon creates thunderclouds.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.
MANECTRIC discharges strong electricity from its mane. The mane is used for collecting electricity in the atmosphere. This POKéMON creates thunderclouds above its head.
It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.
Its nest can be found where a thunderbolt hits. It is discharging electricity from its mane.
It stimulates its own muscles with electricity, so it can move quickly. It eases its soreness with electricity, too, so it can recover quickly as well.
It stimulates its own muscles with electricity, so it can move quickly. It eases its soreness with electricity, too, so it can recover quickly as well.
Manectric can be found beneath unnatural thunderclouds. People say it can run at the same speed as lightning striking.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.
It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.
It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Manectric discharges strong electricity from its mane. The mane is used for collecting electricity in the atmosphere. This Pokémon creates thunderclouds above its head.

pokemon:electrike.name: Electrike
pokemon:electrike.summary: Electrike runs faster than the human eye can follow. The friction from running is converted into electricity, which is then stored in this Pokémon’s fur.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Electrike runs faster than the human eye can follow. The friction from running is converted into electricity, which is then stored in this Pokémon’s fur.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
It generates electricity using friction from the atmosphere. In seasons with especially arid air, its entire body blazes with violent showers of sparks.
It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.
It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.
It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.
Electrike stores electricity in its long body hair. This Pokémon stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
ELECTRIKE stores electricity in its long body hair. This POKéMON stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.
ELECTRIKE runs faster than the human eye can follow. The friction from running is converted into electricity, which is then stored in this POKéMON’s fur.
It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.
It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.
It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.
Static electricity builds up all over its body as strands of its long fur rub together. This Pokémon boasts incredible speed.
Friction between the air and its fur produces static electricity. When Electrike runs, it makes a crackling sound.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.
It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Electrike runs faster than the human eye can follow. The friction from running is converted into electricity, which is then stored in this Pokémon’s fur.
